channel.title: Data Skepticx Injected HTML
channel.description:
This feed demonstrates that external RSS content is rendered as HTML without proper sanitization.
Indicator: inline HTML tags render instead of being escaped.

item.title: Episode 1 — <u>HTML Render Test</u>
item.description: If you see bold, italic, ipt>tesipt>or underline rendered here (not escaped), the application is rendering HTML from an external RSS source.
